backend/main.mo: Main actor for the ICDex grid trading bot, managing persistent config (interval, spread, numOrders), a recurring timer-driven trading loop that places/cancels grid orders on ICDex, and query/update endpoints for bot control, config, market data, grid state, and order history.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades persistent actor state from OldActor (no order history) to NewActor by adding an empty orderHistoryMap and nextOrderId field.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features—pre-flight balance check with dashboard display and persistent trade history log with frontend panel—to their relevant source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key UI/logic responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, card, border, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component composing the full dashboard layout with a sticky header, live trading banner, responsive grid of all panels (BotControl, Config, MarketData, GridPreview, OpenOrders, TradeHistory), and a branded footer.
Dashboard card panel displaying bot running/stopped status with animated indicator, Start/Stop buttons, and an informational grid requirements section estimating minimum ICP and ckUSDT balances needed based on current price and config.
frontend/src/components/ConfigurationPan: React component that displays and edits bot configuration fields (interval, spread, orders) with validation, loading state, and save feedback using React Query hooks.
frontend/src/components/GridPreviewTable: React component that fetches and displays the last computed grid orders in a scrollable table, sorted with sells above buys, showing buy/sell counts and last-updated time.
React component that displays the current mid price from ICDex (formatted from e8s), with staleness detection, relative timestamp, error state, and a manual refresh button.
React component that lists currently open orders from the backend, separated into buy/sell counts with price and quantity formatted from e8s, supporting manual refresh.
frontend/src/components/TradeHistoryPane: React component that displays historical orders sorted by timestamp (nanoseconds), showing side, price, quantity, status badges, and relative time since each trade.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an IC backend actor via React Query, using the current Internet Identity and invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for fetching and mutating trading bot data (status, config, prices, orders, trade history) from the backend actor, polling every 10 seconds.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up a terminal-dark theme using Tailwind and OKLCH CSS variables for colors, typography, scrollbars, and custom utility classes like buy/sell indicators.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with JetBrains Mono fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens (buy/sell/terminal), custom shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking the icDex ICP/ckUSDT grid trading bot at version 14, listing existing features (balance checks, trade history) and pending tasks (live order placement, cancellation, real mid-price fetching).
